page_content:
ISRL628 Special Topics in Israeli History (3 Credits)

An exploration of aspects of the history of Modern Israel. Topics will vary. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Meyerhoff Program & Center for Jewish Studies.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

ISRL638 Special Topics in Israeli Politics (3 Credits)

An exploration of aspects of Israeli politics. Topics will vary.
